description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Tony Bibbs and Vincent Furia MVCnPHP 3.0 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the glConf[path_library] parameter to (1) BaseCommand.php, (2) BaseLoader.php, and (3) BaseView.php.
